title: Assistant Store Manager - Lulu Hypermarket India - 2025 Hiring Drive

jsonLd.title: Assistant Store Manager - Lulu Hypermarket India - 2025 Hiring Drive
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Assistant Store Manager with drive and ambition, Lulu Hypermarket India in Raipur is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Lulu Hypermarket India:
Lulu Hypermarket India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Manage shrinkage and reduce stock discrepancies
• Prepare daily sales reports and share insights with management
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Monitor inventory levels and coordinate replenishment activities

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Category Management
• Proficiency in POS Systems
• Proficiency in Team Leadership
• Proficiency in SAP Retail
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in Shrinkage Control
• Proficiency in E-commerce Integration
• Proficiency in Planogram

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Annual performance appraisal
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Raipur, Chhattisgarh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Lulu Hypermarket India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
